card.name: CG13 Start the Fight
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. Take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CB10 Marshal Forces
card.text: You draw a card and lose 1 life. Amass Soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CW07 Inspiring Revolutionary
card.text: When this creature enters, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CR09 Rollicking Rider
card.text: When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. Cycling {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CU12 Under Observation
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell. • Amass Soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CW02 Helpful Vigilante
card.text: Lifelink Cycling {W} ({W}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CB05 Pilfering Amphibian
card.text: Menace Uprising — When this creature enters, if you control another Rebel, target opponent discards a card.

card.name: CR06 Street-Wise Combatants
card.text: Haste Uprising — Whenever this creature attacks, if you control another Rebel, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: CG04 Motorcycle Muscle
card.text: When this creature enters or you cycle it, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Cycling {1}{G} ({1}{G}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CW12 Show of Force
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater. • Amass Soldiers 3. (Put three +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CU11 Trippin'
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature is a Citizen and can't become untapped. (It also loses all other creature types.)

card.name: CB04 Reckless Rioter
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you draw a card and you lose 1 life. {R}: This creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: CR02 Dancing Diva
card.text: Whenever you discard one or more cards, this creature gets +1/+1 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: CG11 Street Art
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {3}{W}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Create two 1/1 black Bird creature tokens with flying. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CR07 Night Rider
card.text: Haste Whenever you discard one or more cards, this creature deals 1 damage to target player. Cycling {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CB03 Grunt Enforcer
card.text: When this creature dies, amass Soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CB01 Causless Ruffian
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: CG12 Urban Vibrance
card.text: Enchant land Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {G}. {4}{G}, Sacrifice this Aura: Take to the streets. You gain 3 life. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CG06 Beefhead Bouncer
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Raid — This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if you attacked this turn.

card.name: CU07 Deprogrammed Replicant
card.text: Defender Whenever you take to the streets, this creature can attack this turn as though it didn't have defender. Cycling {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CU08 Censor
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}. Cycling {U} ({U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CW04 Dropship Recruiter
card.text: Armies you control have vigilance. When this creature enters, amass soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CW11 Court of Public Opinion
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block. {1}{W}: Exile enchanted creature. You gain 2 life. Activate only if you took to the streets this turn.

card.name: CB09 Shred
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card or pay {2}. Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: CG14 Civil Deconstruction
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. Uprising — If you controlled a Rebel as you cast this spell, add one mana of any color.

card.name: UR12 Smash and Grab
card.text: Smash and Grab deals 2 damage to any target. Raid — If you attacked this turn, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: CU10 Preventative Strike
card.text: Up to one target creature gets -3/-0 until end of turn. Amass Soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CW10 Touch the Dataline
card.text: Target creature you control gains flying until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: CB02 Ratpack Kingpin
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. If you sacrificed a multicolored permanent this way, create a Treasure token.

card.name: CG09 Colossal Shredmaw
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.

card.name: CR01 Rocket Hamster
card.text: Haste This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control a multicolored permanent.

card.name: CU06 Dynamo Defector
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CW01 Mecho-Grunt
card.text: When this creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. If that creature is an Army, put an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CR11 Thrill of Possibility
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: CB08 Dark-Alley Demon
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. Cycling {B} ({B}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CR03 Hired Gun
card.text: Reach Raid — When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it if you attacked this turn.

card.name: CW09 Dogmatic Angel
card.text: Flying, vigilance When this creature enters, Army creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: CG02 Kick-Flip Koala
card.text: Trample Raid — {4}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you attacked this turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: CU03 Underground DJ
card.text: Whenever you discard one or more cards, this creature gets +1/+0 and can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: CW13 Banishing Light
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: CU05 Coldtouch Dissident
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it. {2}{B}: Take to the streets. Activate only as a sorcery. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CR12 Rewire
card.text: Uprising — This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a Rebel. Rewire deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: CR04 Hotshot
card.text: Haste {T}: Add {R}. Whenever another Rebel you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: CG08 Mech Tech
card.text: Vigilance, reach Uprising — When this creature enters, if you control another Rebel, draw a card.

card.name: CM01 Call Spec Ops
card.text: Surveil 1, then draw two cards. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Amass Soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CM02 Two-Wheel Bruiser
card.text: During turns other than yours, this Vehicle is an artifact creature. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.) Cycling {UB} ({UB}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CM03 Katana Gang
card.text: Haste, menace Uprising — At the beginning of your end step, if you control another Rebel, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: CM04 Dataline Surfing
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. Raid — If you attacked this turn, create a Treasure token.

card.name: CM05 Market Street Mob
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life and take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CM06 Mind Tap
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. Amass Soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CM07 Let it Rip
card.text: Draw two cards. Then you may discard a nonland card. When you do, Let it Rip deals 5 damage to target creature.

card.name: CM08 Let Loose
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Uprising — If you controlled a Rebel as you cast this spell, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: CM09 Rockers of the Free World
card.text: Vigilance Raid — When this creature enters, if you attacked this turn, create two 1/1 red Rebel creature tokens.

card.name: CM10 Block Party
card.text: Create three 2/2 white Rebel creature tokens with vigilance. Take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CW03 Skid-Row Informant
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you gain 1 life and scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: CW05 Skywise Rebel
card.text: Flying Uprising — Whenever this creature attacks, if you control another Rebel, up to one other target creature gets +1/+0 and gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: CW14 Cover Up
card.text: Raid — This spell costs {2} less to cast if you attacked this turn. Exile target creature or artifact.

card.name: CU01 CCT Croaker
card.text: Whenever you take to the streets, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This creature is a Rebel in addition to its other types as long as it has two or more counters on it.

card.name: CU04 Biker Tactician
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card. Cycling {U} ({U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CU09 Find Your People
card.text: Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn. Uprising — If you control a Rebel as you cast this spell, that creature gets +0/+3 until end of turn.

card.name: CU14 Dropship Detention
card.text: Target creature's controller puts it on the top or bottom of its owner's library. Amass Soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: CB06 Entry Team
card.text: Flash This creature has flying as long as it entered the battlefield this turn.

card.name: CB07 Diehard Dame
card.text: Flying Uprising — When this creature enters, if you control another Rebel, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CB12 Word on the Street
card.text: Raid — If you attacked this turn, scry 2. You draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: CB11 Street Clash
card.text: Choose one or both — • Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that creature is an Army, put an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CB13 Scream Core
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains deathtouch and "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control." Raid — If you attacked this turn, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: CB14 Unplug
card.text: Destroy target creature. Take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CR14 Send a Message
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: CR08 Short Kings
card.text: Haste Uprising — When this creature enters, if you control another Rebel, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: CR05 Expert Insurgent
card.text: Raid — When this creature enters, if you attacked this turn, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: CG01 Acid Drop Viper
card.text: When this creature attacks, it gets +1/+0 and gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: CG03 Daring Dame
card.text: Whenever you take to the streets, this creature gets +1/+3 and gains vigilance until end of turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: CG05 Wolf of Wall Street
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CG07 Urban Artist
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. At the beginning of your second main phase, if this creature attacked, untap it.

card.name: CG10 Party Ape
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CA01 Street Tag
card.text: The artifact enters tapped. When this artifact enters, draw a card. Raid — {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. This ability cost {1} less to activate if you attacked this turn.

card.name: CR13 Giant Effin Slash
card.text: Giant Effin Slash deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If {G} was spent to cast this spell, excess damage is dealt to that permanent's controller instead.

card.name: UL01 City Square
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand. When you do, choose two different colors. {T}: Add two mana in any combination of the chosen colors.

card.name: CL01 Back Alley
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: CL02 Embassy Row
card.text: As this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}

card.text: As this land enters, you may pay {1}. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}

card.name: CM13 Industrial Park Freerunner
card.text: Haste This creature can't be blocked by token creatures.

card.name: CU02 Hypno Bass
card.text: Flash If you control a multicolored permanent, this creature has flying.

card.name: CU13 Data Tap
card.text: Surveil 1, then draw a card. Raid — You may cast this spell from your graveyard as long as you attacked this turn. When you do, exile it as it resolves.

card.name: CW06 Unyielding Sycophant
card.text: Flash Whenever this creature attacks, untap target creature you control.

card.name: CW08 Compromised Replicants
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. Those creatures gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: UM01 City Surfer
card.text: Flying Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Whenever you put one or more counters on another creature you control, put a counter of that kind on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: UM03 Doctor Antavious
card.text: When Doctor Antavious enters, surveil 3. (Look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Whenever you surveil, put that many +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: UM05 Revolution Engine
card.text: Trample, haste Uprising — When this Vehicle enters, if you control a Rebel, it becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: UM09 Goofy Foot Cherub
card.text: Uprising — {T}: Add one mana of any color. If you control another Rebel, add two mana in any combination of colors instead.

card.name: UM07 Painter Gator
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, if you control another multicolored permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have trample.

card.name: UM11 Surveilance State
card.text: When this enchantment enters, amass soldiers 3. Whenever you amass, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. • Surveil 1 • Each opponent loses 2 life you gain 2 life.

card.name: UM02 Stun Zapper
card.text: Tap target creature and put three stun counters on it. Take to the Streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: UM13 Lydia, Rider of Mayhem
card.text: Whenever you discard a card, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn. Whenever you cycle a card, Lydia deals 1 damage to any target. Cycling {U}{B}{R} ({U}{B}{R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: UM04 Lazarus Protocol
card.text: Search your library for a card with cycling, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Flashback {4}{U}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: UM15 Parkland Witch
card.text: Whenever you attack, target attacking creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it.

card.name: UM06 Run It Back
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. If that creature is a Rebel, it gains haste until end of turn. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: UM17 Party Girl
card.text: Double strike Raid — At the beginning of your end step, if you attacked this turn, untap up to one target creature you control and put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: UM08 Double or Nothing
card.text: Discard your hand. Draw a card and create a Treasure token for each creature that attacked this turn.

card.name: UM19 Inviting Influencer
card.text: Whenever you trigger an ability of the watchtower, that ability triggers an additional time. {1}{G}{W}{U}: Take to the Streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: UM10 Recombinating
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Creatures you control gain trample until end of turn. Then double the number of +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: UM12 Clayton, Embassy Informant
card.text: Whenever you amass, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn. Soldiers you control have vigilance.

card.name: UM14 Jessica, Undercity Fence
card.text: When Jessica enters, you may cast a card with cycling from your graveyard until end of turn. If it would be put anywhere other than the battlefield, exile it instead.

card.name: UM16 DeSean, Community Cultivator
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn choose menace, trample or haste. Rebels you control gain that ability until end of turn.

card.name: UM18 Bart, Boon Town Machinist
card.text: Bart has indestructible as long as it's attacking. Raid — When Bart enters, if you attacked this turn, it deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: UM20 Dex, Well-Connected
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library at anytime. You may cast the top card of your library if you took to the streets this turn.

card.name: UW01 Public Artist
card.text: When you take to the streets, this creature gains vigilance until end of turn. {2}{W}: Take to the Streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: UB01 Captain Bones
card.text: This creature can't block {2}{B}, Remove a counter from a creature you control: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: UR08 Feel the Music
card.text: Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn. Cycling {R} ({R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: UG01 Market Street Racer
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 3 life. Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) When you cycle Market Street Racer, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: UU01 Skyward Hare
card.text: Flying Cycling {X}{U}{U} ({X}{U}{U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) When you cycle this card, up to X target creatures you control gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: UW02 Market Street Tagger
card.text: This creature enters the battlefield with X +1/+1 counters on it. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may move any number of +1/+1 counters from this creature onto another target creature you control.

card.name: UW03 Block Enforcer
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature you control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: UW04 Extra Legal Armorer
card.text: {2}{W}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. This ability cost {1} less for each counter on that creature.

card.name: UW05 Go Up in Smoke
card.text: Raid — Exile target tapped creature. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control unless you attacked this turn.

card.name: UU02 Cybernet Tiefling
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {U}. If you do, target player mills two cards. This creature gets +2/+2 if a player has an instant and a sorcery card in their graveyard.

card.name: UU04 Kira, Double Agent
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if an opponent controls a creature with the greatest power, scry 1. As long as you control the creature with the greatest power, instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {2} less to cast.

card.name: UB09 Rise Above the Masses
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Then if it is your main phase, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: UB10 Rough Questioning
card.text: Target player discards two cards. If one or more land cards are discarded this way, amass soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: UB11 Cursed Kicks
UB02 Data Weaver
card.text: Flying Whenever you discard one or more cards, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life for each card discarded that way. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: UB03 Reprogrammed Killbot
card.text: When this creature enters, each player sacrifices a creature. Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: UR02 Dataline Detective
card.text: First strike When this creature deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of that players library. You may play that card until end of turn.

card.name: UR10 Find the LAN Party
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard two cards. Draw two cards and create two Treasure tokens. Up to two target creatures can't block this turn.

card.name: UR03 The Champ
card.text: When The Champ attacks, it deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature. If excess damage is dealt this way, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: UR01 Digital Artist
card.text: {3}{R}, {T}: This creature deals 2 damage to each opponent. You may activate this ability without paying its mana cost if you cast a multicolored spell this turn.

card.name: UR13 Send It!
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Raid — Send It! deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target. If you attacked this turn, damage can't be prevented this turn.

card.name: UR04 Smoking Dragon
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal Rebel creature cards with total mana value 4 or less. Put those creatures onto the battlefield. They each gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: UG02 Inline Ostrich
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, you may exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: UG10 Break from the Rat Race
card.text: Choose one — • Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt by Rebel creatures this turn. • Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to Rebel creatures this turn.

card.name: UG12 Food Truck
card.text: When this artifact enters or attacks, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Sacrifice two Foods: Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn. Activate only on your turn. Crew 3

card.name: UG11 Earth Within
card.text: Destroy target noncreature permanent. Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: UW06 Reconnaisance Leader
card.text: Flash Whenever this creature attacks, amass Soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: UU08 Evade Authorities
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature can't be blocked and gains "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may return it to its owner's hand." Whenever you cycle a card, you may pay {U}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UG06 Bunny, the Muscle
card.text: Trample Uprising — At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may tap another untapped Rebel you control. If you do, Bunny gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Untap her.

card.name: UB04 Pain-Killer
card.text: Menace {1}, Sacrifice another creature: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it. If you sacrificed an Army this way, this creature deals damage equal to that Army's power to any target.

card.name: RR01 Delivery Boy
card.text: Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature gets +1/+0, has haste and can't block. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, put a cash counter on this Aura. Then if there are three or more cash counters on this Aura, sacrifice it and create three Treasure tokens.

card.name: RC01 Spreading Art
card.text: Mural (Other Graffiti you control that don't share a color with this one gain the following abilities.) When this Graffiti enters, add one mana of any color.

card.name: UC01 Rainbow Road
card.text: When you cast this spell, copy it if you control a multicolored permanent. Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: UL02 The Citadel
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}, {U}, or {B}. {W}{W}{U}{U}{B}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Amass Soldiers 4. (Put four +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: UL03 Neon Circuit
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}, {B}, or {R}. {U}{U}{B}{B}{R}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: You draw two cards. Each opponent discards two cards and loses 2 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UL05 Aurora Ward
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}, {W}, {U}. {G}{G}{W}{W}{U}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a token that is a copy of target nonland permanent you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UL04 The Red Front
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}, {R}, or {G}. {B}{B}{R}{R}{G}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target permanent you don't control.

card.name: UL06 Podunk Town
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}, {G}, or {W}. {R}{R}{G}{G}{W}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain haste and vigilance until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UW08 Dildobot
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: UW07 Embassy Healer
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. If that card had mana value 3 or less, amass soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: UU09 Brain Dead
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. {5}: Shuffle this Aura and enchanted creature into their owner's libraries. Any player may activate this ability if they took to the streets this turn.

card.name: UB05 Hackomancer
card.text: {2}{B}, Sacrifice this creature: Target opponent reveals their hand. You may choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UR05 Night Life Ender
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature can't block until end of turn. Uprising — Whenever this creature attacks, if you control another Rebel, this creature gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: UG07 F.A.R.M. Squad
card.text: Trample This creature enters with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste. As long as this creature has a +1/+1 counter on it, it's an Army in addition to its other types.

card.name: UU14 Embassy Row Cycle
card.text: Flying When this Vehicle enters, search your library for a basic Plains, Island, or Swamp card reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2 Cycling {W}{U}{B}

card.name: UW14 Market Street Cycle
card.text: Vigilance When this Vehicle enters, search your library for a basic Forest, Plains, or Island card reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2 Cycling {G}{W}{U}

card.name: UB14 Canal Town Cycle
card.text: Menace When this Vehicle enters, search your library for a basic Island, Swamp, or Mountain card reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2 Cycling {U}{B}{R} ({U}{B}{R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: UR14 Industrial Park Cycle
card.text: Haste When this Vehicle enters, search your library for a basic Swamp, Mountain, or Forest card reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2 Cycling {B}{R}{G} ({B}{R}{G}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: UG14 Boonies Cycle
card.text: Trample When this Vehicle enters, search your library for a basic Mountain, Forest, or Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2 Cycling {R}{G}{W} ({R}{G}{W}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: UG08 Bold Outsider
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control a multicolored permanent. Uprising — This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control another Rebel.

card.name: UW09 Hardcore Mummy
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. Whenever you take to the streets, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: UU10 Breakdown
card.text: Counter target multicolored spell unless its controller pays {2}. If a spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: UR11 Bear it All
card.text: Target creature you control gets +3/+0 until end of turn. Raid — Until end of turn, if you attacked this turn, that creature gains "When this creature dies, create a 2/2 red Bear creature token."

card.name: UW10 Calm the Elite
card.text: Exile up to one target creature, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step. Up to one target token creature you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: UR06 Rebel Yell
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a 1/1 red Rebel creature token. Rebel spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Rebels you control have haste.

card.name: UU05 Duck Coolidge
card.text: Flying Uprising — When this creature enters, draw two cards. Then discard a card unless you control another Rebel.

card.name: UW11 Dance Party!
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.) When you attack, target attacking creature gets +1/+1 for each other attacking creature you control that's not attacking a player.

card.name: UU06 Energized Militant
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, this creature gets +1/+0 for each card you've drawn this turn. If you've discarded two or more cards this turn, this creature can't be blocked.

card.name: UU07 Embassy Extractor
card.text: When this creature enter, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. This creature gets +1/+0 if you control an Army.

card.name: UB06 Steel Street Assassin
card.text: Deathtouch When you cycle this creature, up to one target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Cycling {1}{B} ({1}{B}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: UB07 Tracy, Murder Matriarch
card.text: Uprising — At the beginning of your end step, if you control another Rebel, create a 1/1 black bird creature token with flying and lose 1 life.

card.name: UB08 Rundown in the Street
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. Amass Soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: UR07 Rebellious Dinosaur
card.text: Trample, haste Cycling {R} ({R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) When you cycle this card, creatures you control gain haste and trample until end of turn.

card.name: UG13 Shrimphead Mural
card.text: Mural (Other Graffiti you control that don't share a color with this one gain the following abilities.) When this Graffiti enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: UG09 Cozy Vagabond
card.text: Trample Whenever a land enters under your control, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: RB01
card.text: Lifelink Sacrifice a creature: RB01 gets +X/+X until end of turn where X is that creatures power. It becomes a creature until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: RB02 Extermination
card.text: Destroy each creature with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: UU11 Blue Tag
card.text: Mural (Other Graffiti you control that don't share a color with this one gain the following abilities.) When this Graffiti enters, you may exile target creature you control. If you do, create a 3/3 blue Fish enchantment creature token.

card.name: UU12 Energize
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, draw a card. Cycling costs you pay cost {1} less. Sacrifice this enchantment at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: UU13 Intel Gathering
card.text: Draw three cards. Cycling {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) When you cycle Intel Gathering, surveil 1.

card.name: UB12 Checkpoint
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, amass Soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.) {5}{B}, Sacrifice Checkpoint: Destroy target creature. Activate only if you control an Army with power 4 or greater.

card.name: UC04 Runaway Service Vehicle
card.text: When this Vehicle dies, you create a Treasure token. Each opponent creates a tapped Treasure token. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: UC02 Quiet Plant Store
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {1}, {T}, Sacrifice another artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: UC03 Gas Mask
CR10 Hit the Pavement
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Target creature gets +3/+1 until end of turn. Cycling {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: UW12 White Tag
card.text: Mural (Other Graffiti you control that don't share a color with this one gain the following abilities.) When this Graffiti enters, create a 1/1 red Rebel creature token.

card.name: UR09 Red Tag
card.text: Mural (Other Graffiti you control that don't share a color with this one gain the following abilities.) When this Graffiti enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: UB13 Black Tag
card.text: Mural (Other Graffiti you control that don't share a color with this one gain the following abilities.) When this Graffiti enters, search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. You lose 2 life.

card.name: UW13 Breach!
card.text: Destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. Amass Soldiers X. (Put X +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: UW15 Remote Command Center
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose one — • Amass Soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.) • Take to the Streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: UU16 Spray Dancer
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card. If this is the second time this ability has triggered, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: UU15 Recon
card.text: When this creature enters, amass Soldiers X, where X is the difference between the number of cards in your hand and seven. (Put X +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also an Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Orc Army creature token first.) When this creature deals combat damage to a player draw that many cards.

card.name: UR15 Monster Truck Gang
card.text: Uprising — When this creature enters, if you control another Rebel, gain control of target creature for as long as you control this creature. For as long as you control that creature, it has haste and "This creature attacks each turn if able."

card.name: UG15 Streetwise Guardian
card.text: Uprising — When this creature enters, if you control a Rebel, it fights up to one other target creature you don't control.

card.name: UG16 Grow Up on the Streets
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control the creature with the greatest power, draw a card. Otherwise, take to the streets. (If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)

card.name: UG17 Local Artists
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a Graffiti card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. This creature gets +1/+1 for each Graffiti you control.

card.text: Vigilance
